title: Inventory urban heat and health data sources
outcome: Dated source inventory separating satellite LST, weather stations, population, vulnerability, and unusable sources.
validation_method: Reviewer checks sources for URL, date, methodology, grain.
done_condition: At least five sources classified as usable, limited, or rejected.

title: Map intra-urban heat exposure for at least two South Asian cities
outcome: 30m-resolution LST maps with urban-heat-island quantification and ground-station validation.
validation_method: Replicator validates against independent station data and confirms LST-station correlation.
done_condition: LST-station comparison with error statistics and replication.

title: Produce vulnerability-weighted heat risk maps
outcome: Risk maps combining heat exposure, population density, and vulnerability indicators at neighborhood scale.
validation_method: Replicator reruns with alternative vulnerability weightings.
done_condition: Risk map includes methodology, alternative weighting sensitivity, and non-stigmatization caveats.

title: Red-team misuse of heat risk maps
outcome: Failure-mode review for stigmatization, displacement, and false-precision risks.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms mitigations or blocks, then replicated.

title: Check whether outputs match heat-action planning decision needs
outcome: Field-facing review of whether risk maps change heat-action planning responsibly.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, timing, misuse risk, then replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases, replicated review.
